# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

- name: notify on merge
    needs:
        - check changes
        - lint
        - unit test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps: 
        # Check if there is a branch that matches master
        - uses: actions/checkout@v2
            with:
                ref: 'refs/heads/master'
        - name: build
          run: |
              echo "PR title: $INPUT_PRTITLE
              PR description: $INPUT_PRDESCRIPTION"
        - uses: mikepenz/action-notifications-telegram@v1.4.0
           if: always()
           with:
               token:${{ secrets.NOTIFICATIONS }}
           env: 
               message: >-
               	PR title: ${{ inputs.prtitle }}
                PR description: ${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}
